name: @hwai/agent-trace-mcp
description: Local-first agent trace MCP for compact session graphs and Pantheon-safe aggregate telemetry

scripts.benchmark:playwright: npm run build && node ../../scripts/hwai-ensure-service-deps.mjs services/playwright-trace-mcp && npm --prefix ../playwright-trace-mcp run build && node ../../scripts/hwai-playwright-agent-trace-proof.mjs

author: Humanswith.ai
